_publications._publicationTitle: Magnetic Resonance Fingerprinting to Characterize Childhood and Young Adult Brain Tumors.

_contextSnippet: However, T1 and T2 values in CWM remained remarkably stable between first and last scans (change in T1 (median [range]) = 38.3 ms [-61.3 to 97.5 ms], change in T2 = 8.41 ms [-10.0 to 10.33 ms]).
details: T1 and T2 values in contralateral white matter remained remarkably stable between first and last scans (change in T1 median 38.3 ms, change in T2 median 8.41 ms)
